examples: The grass grew thick and velvety.
The moon's round orb would shine high in the sky, casting its velvety light on everything.
It is the pressure which releases the coffee oils; these emulsify and give the coffee its rich, velvety texture.
The outside, with its woody shell and velvety green coating, admittedly offers the more attractive vista.
The mineral and tannin edges balance nicely with the velvety qualities in this wine.
